summary: This is a brief job posting announcement rather than a traditional blog post. Joel Spolsky announces that Fog Creek Software is hiring Tech Support Engineers in New York City. The role involves supporting FogBugz customers via phone and email, including helping them deploy the software on Windows and Unix servers. Joel highlights the company's good working conditions and benefits.
key_points: Fog Creek Software was actively hiring Tech Support Engineers in NYC
The role centered on supporting FogBugz deployments across Windows and Unix servers
Joel used his popular blog as a recruiting channel, consistent with his emphasis on hiring as a top priority
money_quotes: Great conditions and benefits, of course.
key_insight: Joel leveraged his widely-read blog as a direct recruiting tool, reflecting his belief that hiring is among the most important activities a software company undertakes.
